title: Colgate To Declare 60th Year Of Dividend Growth, 10 Companies Boost Annual Dividends
text: The dividend increases continued to come fast and furious in February. Home Depot and Silgan both announced 10%+ increases as Genuine Parts and Walmart extended their dividend growth records.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) Q4 Earnings & Sales Beat, Increase Y/Y
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) delivers an earnings and sales beat in fourth-quarter 2022, maintaining its beat streak. Both the top and bottom lines rise year over year.

title: Genuine Parts Company (GPC) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 23, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Sid Jones - SVP, IR Paul Donahue - Chairman and CEO Will Stengel - President and COO Bert Nappier - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Christopher Horvers - JPMorgan Kate McShane - Goldman Sachs Greg Melich - Evercore ISI Scot Ciccarelli - Truist Securities Liz Suzuki - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Bret Jordan - Jefferies Joe Enderlin - Stephens Inc. Seth Basham - Wedbush Operator Good day, ladies and gentlemen. Welcome to the Genuine Parts Company Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.89% and 3.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Falling Behind
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: 2 Auto Replacement Parts Stocks Still Worth a Watch in a Slow-Moving Industry
text: The Zacks Industry Rank for the Auto Replacement Parts industry paints a dull picture. Braving the industry headwinds are two stocks-GPC and LKQ- that you might consider adding to your watchlist.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) to Report Q4 Earnings: What to Expect
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Genuine Parts' (GPC) Q4 earnings per share and revenues is pegged at $1.90 and $5.35 billion, respectively.

title: Walmart, Home Depot Among 15 Companies To Announce Dividend Increases In Second Half Of February
text: When it comes to annual dividend increases, February is the highlight of the year. There were at least 27 dividend boosts that were announced from a wide variety of companies. Widely held companies 3M, PepsiCo, and Coca-Cola all boosted their dividends in the first half of the month, with Pepsi announcing a 10% increase.

title: 3 Stocks I'm Glad I Bought When I Did
text: Investing doesn't have to be complicated when you can buy great companies and let the businesses and the market do the work for you.

title: Expect a Beat From These 3 Auto Stocks This Earnings Season
text: So far, the Q4 earnings season for the auto space has been pretty decent. Among the firms yet to report results, ALSN, LCID and GPI look well-placed to pull off a beat this earnings season.

title: 3 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth
text: At a time when inflation remains an issue, geopolitical risks are rising and the threat of recession looms large, insisting on quality, safety and dividends when picking stocks is more important than ever. In this article, we will look at three Dividend Kings.

title: 3 Stocks Raising Their Dividends for Over 60 Years
text: Few stocks have a better track record of rewarding their shareholders than this trio of Dividend Kings.

title: Why Genuine Parts (GPC) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Bert's January 2023 Dividend Income Summary
text: We received $736.32 in January dividend income! This represents an 18.46% dividend increase compared to last year. The strong dividend income growth is great! That is exactly how you want to start the year off. Our dividend income grew nearly $115 from January 2022.
